title: OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM - 211info
text: AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off NE Stephens Street, across the street from Costco Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PHARMACY HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG
